nasb.text: But Reuben heard this and rescued him out of their hands and said, “Let us not take his life.”

esv.text: But when Reuben heard it, he rescued him out of their hands, saying, “Let us not take his life.”

cnv.text: 流本聽見了，要救約瑟脫離他們的手。他說：“我們不可取他的性命。”

ccb.text: 吕便听后想救约瑟的性命，就说：“我们不要害他性命。”

csbs.text: 鲁本听见后，要救约瑟脱离他们的手，就说：“我们不可夺取他的性命。”
